GAS PUMP INSPECTIONS MAKE SPEEDY CAR STORY

Lee Davidson The (Salt Lake City) Deseret Morning News January/February 2007
Investigative Methods

Lee Davidson conducted a fast-paced investigation into the accuracy of gas pump measurements across Utah, revealing that 1 in 25 pumps were faulty.

Lee Davidson conducted a fast-paced investigation into the accuracy of gas pump measurements across Utah, revealing that 1 in 25 pumps were faulty. The project, rooted in data analysis from state inspections, raised consumer awareness and prompted discussions about regulatory oversight and inspection transparency in the gasoline sale industry.
